title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Safexpress - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Safexpress - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Safexpress family as a Distribution Manager in Ranchi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Safexpress:
Safexpress is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Safexpress!
